diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class and types for Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType
+- Internal names noticed: Hono from './hono', types exported from './types'
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports Hono framework and type definitions
+- Copy-safe detail: Module exports Hono class and types including Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, Context class, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext types, HonoRequest type, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Provides Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema types
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPResponseError, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, StatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: Defines core type definitions for Hono's type-safe architecture
+- Copy-safe detail: Exported types include Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, HTTPResponseError with status property, BlankEnv, BlankSchema as default constraints
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class that sets up routing with middleware support
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, RouterRoute
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Public Hono class that wraps HonoBase with SmartRouter as default
+- Copy-safe detail: Class Hono<E, S, BasePath> extends HonoBase, constructor accepts HonoOptions with router parameter, defaults to SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter instances
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class with get, post, on, onError, mount methods for routing
+- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute, router, handlers, routes, Hono, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Imports or neighbors: ./router, ./utils/cookie, ./http-exception, ./context
+- Plain-English summary: Core routing class handling request dispatch and middleware composition
+- Copy-safe detail: Class extends for router implementation, methods include onGet, onPost, onPatch, onPut, onDelete, onAny, onAll, on, onError, onNotFound, mount, fetch handler using compose function, errorHandler default implementation returns 500 text response
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class providing req, res, newResponse, get, set, getHeader methods
+- Internal names noticed: ContextVariableMap, status, header, newResponse, req, res, finalized, error
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./http-exception, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Context wrapper holding request response state and response building utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: Class has req property of HonoRequest type, res property for Response, methods for newResponse with status and headers, get, set, getHeader, json, text methods, error property, finalized flag, ExecutionContext, FetchEvent accessors
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class providing json, text, arrayBuffer, parseBody, raw access
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, bodyCache, raw, parseBody, url, method, headers
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/body, ./http-exception, ./request/constants
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper handling body parsing with caching and raw Request access
+- Copy-safe detail: Class HonoRequest<P, I> has raw property as Request, methods json(), text(), arrayBuffer(), bytes(), blob(), formData(); async parseBody with dot and all options; cloneRawRequest helper throws HTTPException if body consumed; url, method, header, headers get/set methods
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol for request matching
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English symbol: Module exports a single unique symbol used in request matching internals
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports GET_MATCH_RESULT as unique symbol for internal request routing identification
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: BodyData type definitions for form parsing with dot and all options
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for multipart and form-data body parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: Types BodyDataValueDot for nested objects, BodyDataValueDotAll for arrays of values, SimplifyBodyData type helper, BodyDataValueComponent for component types including string File and arrays, BodyDataValueObject key-value mapping
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function for middleware composition using koa-compose pattern
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, index, context, next, middleware, onError, onNotFound
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composable building single function from middleware array
+- Copy-safe detail: Exported compose generic function E extends Env, takes middleware array and optional onError onNotFound handlers, returns function accepting context and optional next, dispatch function tracks index to prevent multiple next calls, catches errors via onError, sets context.res on successful handler
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class for structured HTTP error responses
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, getResponse, ContentfulStatusCode, res, status
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Exception class for authentication failures and other fatal HTTP errors
+- Copy-safe detail: Class extends Error with readonly res Response property and readonly status ContentfulStatusCode, constructor accepts status code and options with message cause, getResponse returns provided Response or creates new with status and body, used in middleware via throw
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface:Exports hc client function and parseResponse helper
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client module entry point exporting HTTP client utilities and types
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports hc from ./client, parseResponse and DetailedError from ./utils, types inferResponseType, inferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function creating typed HTTP clients with proxy pattern
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, createProxy, callback, ClientRequestOptions, buildSearchParams
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client implementation using Proxy to generate typed request builders
+- Copy-safe detail: createProxy function wraps callback with path and args, ClientRequestImpl class holds url, method, buildSearchParams, queryParams, fetch options, hc function creates proxy via createProxy with hcCallback handler, buildHonoClientOptions merges global and client options, hc function returns proxy wrapped in createProxy
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client, ClientRequestOptions, InferResponseType, InferRequestType definitions
+- Internal names noticed: Fetch, Client, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, ObjectType
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client including request options and response inference
+- Copy-safe detail: Types include Client generic for route paths and methods, ClientRequestOptions for per-request configuration, Fetch type for typed fetch functions, ClientResponse for response structure, ObjectType for object checking, UnionToIntersection utility type for merging paths
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, deepMerge utilities
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, deepMerge
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client helper utilities for URL manipulation and request building
+- Copy-safe detail: mergePath joins base and path strings, replaceUrlParam substitutes url parameters, buildSearchParams constructs URLSearchParams from object, replaceUrlProtocol swaps http ws, removeIndexString strips index routes, deepMerge recursively combines objects, parseResponse extracts data from fetchRP response with type inference
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function parsing fetch Response with DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch wrapper with smart response parsing and error handling
+- Copy-safe detail: nullBodyResponses set for 101 204 205 304 status, fetchRP awaits fetchRes, hasBody checks body init and status, detectResponseType reads content-type header matching json regex, DetailedError extends Error with detail codelog statusCode properties
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function registering Hono app with Service Worker
+- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, addEventListener, FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Adapter for Service Worker environments using fetch event
+- Copy-safe detail: Fire function accepts Hono app and optional HandleOptions, calls addEventListener fetch with handle wrapper, handle binds globalThis fetch, responds with app fetch result or falls back via opts fetch on 404 status
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function wrapping Hono app for Service Worker execution
+- Internal names noticed: handle, Handler, FetchEvent, handleOptions, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker handler adapter executing Hono via fetch event
+- Copy-safe detail: HandleOptions has fetch optional property for custom fetch, handle returns function accepting FetchEvent, evt.respondWith wraps async app.fetch call with evt request and ExecutionContext, fallback to opts fetch on 404 status via globalThis.bind
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extending Event with Service Worker properties
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent, clientId, preloadResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plugin-English summary: Type definitions for Service Worker FetchEvent interface
+- Copy-safe detail: FetchEvent extends Event with waitUntil method, has clientId string property, handled Promise, preloadResponse Promise, request Request property, resultingClientId string, and respondWith method accepting Response
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
